---
name: Methodology dispute
about: Argue with the opus-4-7-context-test benchmark setup, scoring, or a specific claim
title: "[methodology] "
labels: methodology
assignees: ''
---

## Which benchmark

<!-- e.g. opus-4-7-context-test, sample_repo run, or a specific size
     bucket (small / medium / large). Link the run_id if applicable. -->

## Specific claim disputed

<!-- Quote the exact sentence from the README, blog post, or report
     output that you think is wrong. One claim per issue keeps the
     thread tractable. -->

## Your alternative methodology

<!-- What would you change? Different corpus, different scorer,
     different question shape, different model settings, different
     definition of "effective context"? Be concrete. -->

## Your numbers (link to your run)

<!-- Link to a fork, a gist, a blog post, or a CSV with your run.
     If you have not run it yet, that is fine — flag it as
     "untested hypothesis" and we can run it together. -->
